description: compiler-interface defines the xsbti APIs that Zinc and sbt use to communicate with Scala and Java compilers during incremental compilation. It exposes compile configuration, analysis, reporting, classfile management, and compiler bridge interfaces while keeping the published API usable from JVM bytecode.
